calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-12-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-12-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Edward Nagy, Esq. for Plaintiff: Tack Z. Tseng, also present, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Co-Defendant: Dontay G. Young
After hearing the tetimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Co-Defendant Dontay Young as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 2049 Quesada Ave., 2nd Flr., San Francisco.
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for the return of Exhibits in open court.

Defendant: Maricello Guerrero, present in pro per, settled and signed a stipulation for Judgment for back rent and damages, fees and costs, or for Dismissal if vacated by noon of June 18, 2007. Parties agreed to terms, TRIAL vacated.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: MARC SEIDENFELD FOR PLAINTIFF JACK Z TSENG
NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS MARICELLA GUERRERO AND DONTAY G YOUNG

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR. WHEN CLERK CALLED ROLL, DEFENDANTS DID NOT RESPOND.
HOWEVER THE VOLUNTEER FROM LSR STATED THAT DEFENDANT WAS IN COURT.
THE DEFENDANTS DID NOT SHOW UP FOR THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE.
TRIAL DATE REMAINS.

JUDGE PRO TEM:WILL CHEN ; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; NOT REPORTED(218)
